entries.title: Visa and Airwallex Team on Embedded Finance for Freight Companies
entries.snippet: Visa and Airwallex are joining forces to develop embedded-finance solutions for freight and shipping platforms. The collaboration, announced Thursday (July 23) is designed to modernize the way businesses in these sectors manage payments working capital and cross-border commerce. “Freight and shippin

entries.title: Block and Coinbase Join Fight to Promote Bitcoin Security
entries.snippet: A collection of crypto and finance companies have launched a bitcoin-focused security initiative. The Bitcoin Security Consortium, announced in a news release Thursday (July 22), is backed by $15 million in pledges for its members, and is designed to promote the long-term security and survival of th

entries.title: Flow Traders pilots Lombard's new bitcoin-backed credit strategy for stablecoin borrowing
entries.snippet: Lombard Finance is launching its Bitcoin Onchain Credit Strategy with Flow Traders as the pilot partner.

entries.title: Goldman Sachs CEO backs Clarity Act despite banking industry's concerns over stablecoin rules
Uniswap pushes deeper into tokenized assets with permissioned trading pools
Swiss bank BancaStato launches regulated crypto trading with Sygnum
entries.snippet: Swiss cantonal bank BancaStato integrated Sygnum’s crypto trading and custody services into its Avaloq-powered digital banking apps for Bitcoin and other assets.
entries.tweet_text: Swiss bank BancaStato launches regulated crypto trading with Sygnum

entries.title: S&P launches blockchain fundamentals index for digital assets
entries.snippet: The benchmark tracks blockchain networks using protocol revenue, offering an alternative to traditional market capitalization-weighted crypto indexes.
entries.tweet_text: S&P launches blockchain fundamentals index for digital assets

entries.title: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
entries.snippet: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

entries.title: Crypto Wallet SecondFi Shutters After $2.4 Million Theft
entries.snippet: Cryptocurrency wallet SecondFi is shuttering after an attack drained $2.4 million from its users. The company announced Wednesday (July 22) that it had addressed the vulnerability that permitted the theft of 16.1 million in ADA last month, and had secured another 129 million ADA before hackers could

entries.title: Jack Dorsey's Block Launches Buzz, a Nostr-Based Slack and GitHub Rival for AI Agents
entries.snippet: The free, open source workspace runs on Nostr, gives AI agents their own cryptographic identities, and challenges Slack and GitHub.

entries.title: Korea launches blockchain deposit-token payments to cut small merchant fees
entries.snippet: Korea launches blockchain deposit-token payments to cut small merchant fees Chosunbiz

entries.title: Stablecoin Clearing Bank Augusts Raises $180M For AI-Driven Payments
entries.snippet: Stablecoin Clearing Bank: Augusts Raises $180M For AI-Driven Payments The Cryptonomist
entries.tweet_text: Stablecoin Clearing Bank Augusts Raises $180M For AI-Driven Payments

entries.title: Forward Financing Secures Another $525 Million to Support Small Businesses
entries.snippet: Forward Financing, a provider of capital to small businesses across the United States, secured $525 million of new financing that brings the company’s total committed funding capacity to nearly $700 million. The new financing includes a $350 million variable funding note (VFN) facility and a $175 mi

entries.title: Ramp Opens Stablecoin Accounts and Payments to Business Clients
entries.snippet: Financial operations platform Ramp says it has begun offering customers stablecoin accounts and payments. The new offering, announced Tuesday (July 21), gives businesses a single platform for holding, moving and accounting for fiat and stablecoin funds alike. “Stablecoins have become a normal way fo

entries.title: Pavel Durov says Telegram to roll out native Gram crypto wallet
entries.snippet: Telegram founder Pavel Durov said the messaging platform will roll out a native non-custodial Gram wallet this summer, bringing self-custody crypto transactions to its more than 1 billion users.
entries.tweet_text: Pavel Durov says Telegram to roll out native Gram crypto wallet

entries.title: Coinbase Canada CEO Predicts Stablecoin AI Agent Growth 'Within Months' as Crypto Derivatives Launch Nears
entries.snippet: Coinbase Canada CEO Predicts Stablecoin AI Agent Growth ‘Within Months’ as Crypto Derivatives Launch Nears CCN.com

entries.title: Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol Midnight on Base to expand onchain credit markets
entries.snippet: Morpho has launched Midnight, a fixed-rate, fixed-term lending protocol on Base that complements its existing variable-rate lending protocol.

entries.title: Robinhood Chain tops $430 million in TVL, FalconX sees RWAs as the key differentiator
entries.snippet: Robinhood Chain hit $431M TVL and 250K+ daily users in under three weeks, but memecoins account for 80% of its $9B DEX volume, FalconX says.

entries.title: Pakistan Launches Crypto Investigation Unit to Fight Money Laundering
entries.snippet: Islamabad is building the enforcement side of its crypto push, standing up a unit to police money laundering even as it licenses exchanges.

entries.title: UK Lawmakers Launch Inquiry Into Crypto Banking Access
entries.snippet: A cross-party group is examining why UK banks block accounts and payments for crypto firms—and whether it's holding the sector back.

entries.title: Western Union launches stablecoin card
entries.snippet: Western Union has launched its stablecoin wallet and card in partnership with Visa and Rain.

entries.title: UK parliamentary group launches probe into crypto sector's banking challenges
entries.snippet: This comes weeks after the publication of the UK’s new crypto regulatory framework, set to take effect in October 2027.

entries.title: London Stock Exchange eyes overnight trading launch in 2027
entries.snippet: The move comes as traditional exchanges face growing competition from crypto markets and tokenized equity platforms that offer around-the-clock trading.

entries.title: Visa Bets the Future of Money Still Needs an Operator
entries.snippet: Stablecoins were supposed to make payment networks less necessary. Visa’s new stablecoin platform, introduced Thursday (July 16), suggests a messier outcome. The move comes on the heels of Visa’s June announcement that it had joined a 140-plus member Open Standard consortium to launch Open USD (OUSD
entries.tweet_text: @Visa Bets the Future of Money Still Needs an Operator

entries.title: Bernstein raises Robinhood price target, cites tokenization and prediction markets
entries.snippet: The brokerage’s blockchain strategy, including tokenized equities and its Arbitrum-based Robinhood Chain, could reduce its reliance on traditional crypto trading, analysts said.

entries.title: Brazilian Securities Watchdog Takes Closer Look at Tokenization
entries.snippet: Brazil’s securities regulator has established a working group to explore tokenized securities. This working group, the Comissão de Valores Mobiliários (CVM) announced Friday (July 17), will draft an experimental framework that examines the registration, custody, trading and settlement of tokenized s

entries.title: Vietnam sets fines for unlicensed crypto trading ahead of regulation rollout
entries.snippet: The new rules establish penalties as much as $1,900 for crypto violations, including unlicensed trading and AML breaches, ahead of Vietnam’s regulated crypto market launch.

entries.title: Stablecoin infrastructure startup Cyclops raises $20 million
entries.snippet: Cyclops announced that it has raised a $20M Series A led by Nava Ventures with participation from Castle Island Ventures, Coinbase Ventures, Circle, Lasagna Ventures and Global PayTech Ventures, helmed by Javier Perez, former President of Mastercard and founding investor in Adyen.

entries.title: Circle became a federal trust bank – now lenders warn stablecoins projected to drain $500 billion
entries.snippet: Circle became a federal trust bank – now lenders warn stablecoins is projected to drain $500 billion CryptoRank

entries.title: CFTC collateral rule change could boost tokenized MMF
entries.snippet: This week the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) finalized a rule change for margin for uncleared swaps, which expands the range of money market funds (MMFs) that can be used as initial margin. MMFs were already eligible as collateral, provided they only invested in cash and government secu
entries.tweet_text: CFTC collateral rule change could boost tokenized MMF

entries.title: This Week in Stablecoins: TradFi Doesn't Want DeFi. It Wants Blockchain
entries.snippet: The most important digital asset story this week was not the price of bitcoin, the launch of another cryptocurrency fund or even the continued expansion of stablecoins. It was the widening gap between the parts of crypto that traditional finance wants to preserve and the parts it intends to remove.

entries.title: SBI acquires Singaporean crypto platform Coinhako after MAS approval
entries.snippet: SBI Holdings received regulatory approval to acquire a majority stake in Singapore-based crypto exchange Coinhako as it expands into stablecoins, onchain finance and tokenized assets.
entries.tweet_text: SBI acquires Singaporean crypto platform Coinhako after MAS approval

entries.title: Crypto exchange Bybit launches in Indonesia after NOBI acquisition
entries.snippet: The launch gives Bybit a locally operated platform in one of Asia’s largest crypto markets, home to more than 21 million crypto exchange users.
